WatchFolder.description: `WatchFolder` is a common abstract ancestor for saved searches and tags.

IssueFolder.description: Represents an issue folder, such as a project, a saved search, or a tag.

AllUsersGroup.description: Represents a group containing all users including guest.

RegisteredUsersGroup.description: Represents a group containing all users excluding guest.

WatchFolderSharingSettings.description: Stores users and groups that have access to a tag or a saved search.

UserProfiles.description: Represents a group of settings of a user profile in YouTrack.

LocaleDescriptor.description: Represents a language locale that is used in UI.

PeriodFieldFormat.description: Represents the format, in which the period values are displayed to the user.

VcsUnresolvedUser.description: Represents a VCS change author who could not be associated with any YouTrack user account.

Visibility.description: Represents visibility settings of an entity, for example, an issue or a comment.

UnlimitedVisibility.description: Represents unlimited visibility. When access to an entity is not restricted, the visibility attribute of this entity has the type `UnlimitedVisibility`. Entities of this type do not have any attributes.

LimitedVisibility.description: Represents visibility limited to several users and/or groups.

BundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Represents custom field default settings for enumerated fields.

UserCustomFieldDefaults.description: Represents default settings for the user-type field.

BaseBundle.description: Represents a set of field values in YouTrack.

BundleElement.description: Represents a field value in YouTrack.

FieldStyle.description: Represents the style settings of the field in YouTrack.

LocalizableBundleElement.description: Represents field value that can be localized.

BuildBundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Default settings for the build-type field.

StateBundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Default settings for the state-type field.

VersionBundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Default settings for the version-type field.

EnumBundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Default settings for the enum-type field.

OwnedBundleCustomFieldDefaults.description: Default settings for the owned-type field.

CustomFieldCondition.description: Represents the condition for showing a custom field.

FieldBasedCondition.description: Represents the condition for showing a custom field.

BundleProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a custom field with a defined set of values.

GroupProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a group custom field.

UserProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a user field.

BuildProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a build field.

StateProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a state field.

VersionProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for a version field.

OwnedProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for an owned field.

EnumProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for the enum field.

SimpleProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for the fields of the following types: `integer`, `float`, `date`, `date and time`, `string`.

PeriodProjectCustomField.description: Represents project settings for the period field.

TextProjectCustomField.description: Represents settings of the text-type field in the project.

PeriodIssueCustomField.description: Represents the period field in the issue.

SimpleIssueCustomField.description: Represents a simple-type custom field in the issue.

DateIssueCustomField.description: Represents a date-type custom field in the issue.

DatabaseSingleValueIssueCustomField.description: Represents a a single-value custom field in the issue.

StateIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value state-type custom field in the issue.

SingleBuildIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value build-type custom field in the issue.

SingleUserIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value user-type custom field in the issue.

SingleGroupIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value group-type custom field in the issue.

SingleVersionIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value version-type custom field in the issue.

SingleOwnedIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value owned-type custom field in the issue.

SingleEnumIssueCustomField.description: Represents a single-value enum-type custom field in the issue.

DatabaseMultiValueIssueCustomField.description: Represents a custom field that may have multiple values in the issue.

MultiBuildIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value build-type custom field in the issue.

MultiGroupIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value group-type custom field in the issue.

MultiVersionIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value version-type custom field in the issue.

MultiOwnedIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value owned-type custom field in the issue.

MultiEnumIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value enum-type custom field in the issue.

MultiUserIssueCustomField.description: Represents a multi-value user-type custom field in the issue.

StateMachineIssueCustomField.description: Represents the issue custom field that is managed by a state-machine rule in workflow.

Event.description: Represents a transition from one value to another for a custom field that is managed by a state-machine rule in workflow.

TextIssueCustomField.description: Represents the issue custom field of the `text` type.

TextFieldValue.description: Represents a value of the text field. Returns both source and rendered text.

ExternalIssue.description: For an issue that was imported from another service, represents the reference to the issue in the external system.

IssueVoters.description: Represents users that have voted for the issue or its duplicates.

DuplicateVote.description: Represents a vote for duplicates of the issue.

IssueWatchers.description: Represents users that are subscribed to notifications about the issue.

IssueWatcher.description: Represents a user who subscribed for notifications about an issue.

TagSharingSettings.description: Stores users and groups that have access to a tag.
